﻿Chß╗ìn mode:
1 = DES encrypt
2 = DES decrypt
3 = TripleDES encrypt
4 = TripleDES decrypt
Key 1: 101011001111101100011100011101110110111100011110
Key 2: 111001110101010110000110100101101001111100000111
Key 3: 011110101000001111010101110111100010011111110100
Key 4: 000111011101000000111011011110011110101111001001
Key 5: 101001110000000111111110011100101111010000011011
Key 6: 101111100100101010000101111011110011010100101110
Key 7: 000110110011101100111000101011000111101111101010
Key 8: 100011000011010011111101011101001101101001110111
Key 9: 000110011110010110010110111010101100100101011100
Key 10: 011101000000110110111011110000011111011110011110
Key 11: 111101111010000000100101111111010001011010101001
Key 12: 100010111000111010010110110110100101101001101111
Key 13: 011111000011001010111110000101101111101110111100
Key 14: 101101101001010001101000101100010011110111110001
Key 15: 110010100100101001110110111010111010101000110011
Key 16: 001101011110011001110011101100111100001111101011
